description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in PhotoPost allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the PP_PATH parameter in (1) addfav.php, (2) adm-admlog.php, (3) adm-approve.php, (4) adm-backup.php, (5) adm-cats.php, (6) adm-cinc.php, (7) adm-db.php, (8) adm-editcfg.php, (9) adm-inc.php, (10) adm-index.php, (11) adm-modcom.php, (12) adm-move.php, (13) adm-options.php, (14) adm-order.php, (15) adm-pa.php, (16) adm-photo.php, (17) adm-purge.php, (18) adm-style.php, (19) adm-templ.php, (20) adm-userg.php, (21) adm-users.php, (22) bulkupload.php, (23) cookies.php, (24) comments.php, (25) ecard.php, (26) editphoto.php, (27) register.php, (28) showgallery.php, (29) showmembers.php, (30) useralbums.php, (31) uploadphoto.php, (32) search.php, or (33) adm-menu.php, different vectors than CVE-2006-4828.
